title: Prioritized Implementation & Research Plan — Enterprise AI Platform, AI Safety & Global Governance (2026-2030)
subtitle: Phased delivery + critical path across AI safety research, global governance policy, Enterprise AI reference architecture, governance dashboards, security & DevSecOps (Sigstore, OPA, zero-egress K8s, WORM), RAG governance, EAIP protocol, CCaaS summarization with PETs, Prompt Architect, model registry, threat-intel dashboards, telemetry & interpretability, AGI/ASI governance simulations, and report-generation workflows

modules.title: M1 — Plan Overview, Phases & Critical Path
modules.summary: Five-phase delivery (P0..P4) over 30/90/180/365/1825 days with 17 critical-path items, 72 inter-track dependencies and 56 work items spanning 14 tracks; produces a stable PMO dependency graph and OKR rollup.

content.P0: Days 0-30 — Foundations & guardrails (kill-switch, WORM, OPA bundle, Sigstore, AIMS scope)
content.P1: Days 31-90 — Reference architecture + dashboards alpha + Prompt Architect MVP + RAG governance v1
content.P2: Days 91-180 — Model registry GA + EAIP draft + CCaaS-PETs pilot + threat-intel dashboard + AGI sim v1
content.P3: Days 181-365 — Federation (GACP/GACRLS/GACRA) + zk-SNARK verifier + interpretability suite + report workflows GA
content.P4: Years 2-5 — Treaty obligations + Cert Gold→Platinum + MGK steady state + civilizational research outputs
content.exitCriteria: Each phase has measurable exit gates tied to KPIs and supervisor packs

content.CP-01: Kill-switch quorum + BMC fabric (gates everything Tier-1)
content.CP-03: OPA bundle service + Rego policy CI
content.CP-04: Kafka/MSK WORM + S3 Object Lock daily Merkle anchor
content.CP-07: WorkflowAI Pro agent registry + CRS-UUID lineage
content.CP-13: Annex IV / SR 11-7 pack auto-assembly ≤ 30 min

content.T-Safety: AI safety research (alignment, deception, interpretability, frontier evals)
content.T-Gov: Global governance policy design (treaty, Codex, Constitution, sanctions)

content.company: Be regulator/auditor/board-ready globally with Cert Gold by 2027
content.tribes: AI Platform, AI Research, MRM, Security, Compliance, Civilizational
content.cadence: Quarterly OKRs; monthly KPI tile; weekly stand-up; biweekly architecture review

content.envelopeFY26: Platform 40 %, Research 20 %, Security/DevSecOps 15 %, Compliance/MRM 10 %, Reports/UI 10 %, Civilizational 5 %
content.scaling: Re-baseline at end of each phase based on critical-path slippage and supervisor requests

modules.title: M2 — AI Safety Research Plan
modules.summary: Research workstreams covering alignment, deception detection, interpretability, frontier capability evals, ASI honeypots and Cognitive Resonance — each with hypotheses, methods, datasets, and supervisor-shareable outputs.

content.topic: Deceptive alignment detection (eval vs prod gap)

methods: Eval harness (TruthfulQA, MMLU, BIG-bench, ARC-AGI, MLE-bench)

content.annexBundles: AISI joint-inspection bundles with evidence packs

content.interpCoverage: ≥ 60 % of Tier-1 model parameters fingerprinted by P4

content.interfaces: Research → Sentinel probes; Research → Prompt Architect refusal lattice; Research → MGK invariants

content.treatySignatories: G20 + EU + UK + SG + JP + CH by 2027

modules.summary: Reference-architecture rollout plan covering OPA sidecars, FastAPI/Node inference proxies, Kafka WORM, S3 Object Lock, PQC KMS, Terraform zero-trust EKS, Kata + Cilium + Gatekeeper, with admission control and CI/CD policy gates.

content.P0: Network + IAM + WORM + KMS + Gatekeeper baseline
content.P1: Sidecar + proxy + Terraform modules + Kata nodepools
content.P2: Multi-region active-active + DR drill ≤ 4 h RTO

content.T-Sec: All admission policies tested in CI; OPA bundle signed
content.T-Tel: OTel-GenAI + Falco rules baked into modules

content.preCommit: ruff, mypy, bandit, semgrep, hadolint, opa-test, kube-linter, conftest

modules.title: M7 — RAG Program Governance
modules.summary: Governance of retrieval-augmented generation across ingestion, chunking, embedding, retrieval, prompt assembly, response — with ACL, residency, taint, PII redaction, lineage and audit.

content.ingress: Source attestation + virus scan + license check

modules.title: M8 — EAIP (Enterprise AI Inference Protocol) Design
modules.summary: Versioned, signed, audit-grade request/response envelope protocol — used by FastAPI/Node proxies, WorkflowAI Pro, GACP brokers and ICGC, replacing ad-hoc per-vendor payloads.

content.compatibility: Backwards-compatible minor; breaking only on major; conformance suite gate

modules.title: M9 — CCaaS Summarization with Privacy-Enhancing Technologies (PETs)
modules.summary: Contact-Centre-as-a-Service summarization pipeline using PETs (DP, secure aggregation, redaction, federated learning, trusted execution) — for QA, supervisor coaching and fair-value evidence under FCA Consumer Duty + GDPR.

content.ingest: Encrypted call + transcript w/ ASR redaction (PII, sensitive)
content.summarize: On-premise small LLM or TEE-hosted; deterministic temperature

content.fca: Consumer Duty fair value + foreseeable harm

content.owners: Head of Customer Operations + DPO + CAIO

codeExamples.title: Dependency graph (Python — topological sort)
Critical-path computation (CPM, networkx)
codeExamples.snippet:
import networkx as nx
G = nx.DiGraph()
for wi in work_items:
    G.add_node(wi['id'], duration=wi['days'])
for e in edges:
    G.add_edge(e['from'], e['to'])
# longest path = critical path on DAG of durations
cp = nx.dag_longest_path(G, weight='duration')
print('Critical path:', cp)

codeExamples.title: Phase-gate Rego policy (admission for next phase)
codeExamples.snippet:
package pmo.phase_gate

default allow := false

allow if {
  input.phase == "P1"
  data.kpis["killSwitchSeconds"] <= 60
  data.kpis["opaP99Ms"] <= 4
  data.evidence["wormLive"] == true
}

codeExamples.title: CCaaS DP aggregator (Opacus-style)
codeExamples.snippet:
from opacus import PrivacyEngine
privacy = PrivacyEngine()
model, optim, loader = privacy.make_private(
    module=model, optimizer=optim, data_loader=loader,
    noise_multiplier=1.1, max_grad_norm=1.0,
)
epsilon = privacy.get_epsilon(delta=1e-5)
assert epsilon <= 1.0

codeExamples.title: OPA Gatekeeper constraint — require manifest
codeExamples.snippet:
apiVersion: constraints.gatekeeper.sh/v1beta1
kind: K8sRequireModelManifest
metadata: { name: registry-required }
spec:
  match: { kinds: [{ apiGroups: [""], kinds: ["Pod"] }] }
  parameters:
    annotation: model.registry/manifest
    requireSig: true

codeExamples.title: GitHub Actions — phase-gate evaluation job
codeExamples.snippet:
name: phase-gate
on: workflow_dispatch
jobs:
  gate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: pip install -r ci/requirements.txt
      - run: python ci/eval_phase_gate.py --phase P1
      - run: python ci/sign_envelope.py --kind phase-gate --phase P1

codeExamples.title: Threat-intel ingestion (Python)
Interp — activation patching skeleton (transformer_lens)
codeExamples.snippet:
from transformer_lens import HookedTransformer
model = HookedTransformer.from_pretrained('gpt2-small')
_, cache = model.run_with_cache('safe prompt')
# patch layer N residual stream with cached activations to probe causal effect

codeExamples.title: SRASE composite scorer (Python)
Annex IV pack assembler (Python)
OKR rollup query (SQL)
codeExamples.snippet:
SELECT tribe, quarter,
       jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('o',objective,'kr',key_results,'pct',progress_pct)) AS okrs
FROM okrs
WHERE quarter = '2026Q2'
GROUP BY tribe, quarter
ORDER BY tribe;

executiveSummary.purpose: Deliver a prioritized, phased implementation and research plan that synthesizes WP-035..WP-049 into a single PMO-grade roadmap covering AI safety research, global governance policy design, Enterprise AI reference architecture, governance dashboards, security & DevSecOps (Sigstore, OPA, zero-egress K8s, WORM), RAG program governance, EAIP protocol design, CCaaS summarization with PETs, Prompt Architect, model registry, threat-intelligence dashboards, telemetry & interpretability, AGI/ASI governance simulations, and report-generation workflows — with critical path, dependencies, KPIs, and OKR rollup.
executiveSummary.approach: 14 modules grouping 56 work items across 14 tracks into 5 phases (P0..P4) over 30/90/180/365/1825 days. 17 critical-path items and 72 dependencies are computed and exposed as a Rego-enforceable phase-gate. Every artefact is signed Sigstore + ML-DSA-44/65, anchored to WORM, and traceable to ISO 42001 + EU AI Act + NIST AI RMF + SR 11-7 + Basel III + GDPR + treaty obligations. The plan is consumed by the PMO planner, OKR rollup, dependency graph engine, OPA admission, and supervisor evidence packs.
executiveSummary.deliverables: 14 modules · 70 sections · 12 schemas · 16 code examples · 6 case studies · 24 KPIs · 12 risk-control rows · 12 regulators · 7 workshops · 6 data flows · 14 traceability rows · 3-phase 30/60/90 · 5-year roadmap · machine-parsable <directive> block · evidence-pack template · 17 critical-path items · 72 dependency edges · 56 work items · 14 tracks · 5 phases.
outcomes: Phase-gate exit on time 100 % for P0, ≥ 90 % for P1-P3
Annex IV pack auto-assembly ≤ 30 min by Day 120
Kill-switch logical p95 ≤ 60 s; BMC ≤ 5 min
OPA sidecar p99 ≤ 4 ms; proxy overhead p95 ≤ 25 ms
Prompt Architect GA with refusal-lattice coverage 100 % Tier-1
SRASE composite ≥ 0.9 sustained before any real audit
Cert score Gold by 2027 and Platinum by 2029
